title: check_lag pure function is the right abstraction — do not collapse into check_sync_lag
description: check_lag(local_tip, chain_tip, max_lag_blocks) is a pure u64->Result function. All 7 tests exercise it directly with no DB or network dependency. A contributor refactoring sync_guard may suggest replacing check_lag with check_sync_lag (which wraps the DB and network calls together) to eliminate the caller needing to fetch scan_tip and chain_tip separately. Do not do that: the pure function is what makes all sync_guard tests fast and network-free. The check_sync_lag wrapper adds no value (it's dead code) and erases type information.
